Multiple customers highlight their fair pricing, prompt service, and willingness to go above and beyond, making them a solid choice for emergency plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Don the Plumber LLC
plumbers.summary: Don the Plumber LLC appears to be a highly reliable, family-owned business with exceptional customer service and fair pricing. While 24-hour availability is unclear, they show good emergency responsiveness and have consistently satisfied customers across various plumbing issues.

plumbers.name: Made's Plumbing
plumbers.summary: Made's Plumbing demonstrates exceptional reliability and honesty with a perfect 5-star rating across 423 reviews. Customers consistently praise their problem-solving abilities, with one noting they succeeded where three other plumbers had failed, and their commitment to going above and beyond expectations.

plumbers.name: Piece of Mind Plumbing - 24 Hour Emergency Plumbers
plumbers.summary: Piece of Mind Plumbing appears to be a reliable emergency plumber with fast response times and honest service. Multiple customers report same-day service for urgent issues, and the company demonstrates integrity by alerting customers to problems outside their expertise.

plumbers.name: Village Plumbing, LLC
plumbers.summary: Village Plumbing (Douglas) appears to be a highly reliable local plumber with excellent craftsmanship and strong emergency responsiveness. Multiple long-term customers praise his quick response times, diagnostic skills, and reasonable pricing, making him a solid choice for both emergency repairs and larger projects.

plumbers.name: Lewis Brothers Plumber & HVAC
plumbers.summary: Lewis Brothers Plumber & HVAC demonstrates exceptional emergency responsiveness and reliability, with multiple reviews highlighting rapid response times including 10-minute arrival on a Friday evening and same-day scheduling. Their technicians are consistently described as professional, knowledgeable, and skilled at both repairs and explaining issues to customers.

plumbers.name: Around the Clog, LLC
plumbers.summary: Around the Clog appears to be a highly reliable plumbing company with excellent customer service and integrity. Doug consistently receives praise for showing up on time, providing same-day service, and going above and beyond for customers, including emergency situations.

plumbers.name: Colorado Green Plumbing, Heating & Cooling
plumbers.summary: Colorado Green Plumbing consistently demonstrates excellent emergency responsiveness, with multiple customers praising their ability to arrive within 24 hours and their honest, professional service. The company appears to have skilled technicians who explain problems clearly and work efficiently, making them a solid choice for emergency plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Planet Plumbing & Drain
plumbers.summary: Planet Plumbing & Drain shows excellent diagnostic skills and reliability, with technicians who solve complex problems other plumbers couldn't fix. They offer fair pricing, professional service, and appear willing to work evenings when needed, making them a solid choice for emergency situations.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.summary: They'll get to you fast, but expect to pay two to three times what competitors charge for the same work.
redFlags: Systematic overcharging: 10 of 13 reviews explicitly complain about prices 3-10x typical market rates
Questionable diagnostic practices: Techs recommend expensive repairs without thorough inspection; one reviewer caught tech contradicting themselves
Refusal to provide documentation: One reviewer denied video copy of sewer camera inspection, claimed it was 'proprietary'
Pressure sales tactics: High-pressure contracts offered during emergencies (sewage backup); misrepresentations about insurance coverage
Poor follow-through: One reviewer reports supervisor disappeared after contract signed; another notes incomplete cleanup after sewage work
Scheduling unreliability: 2-4 hour delays despite confirmed time windows; poor call-back responsiveness

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.summary: They'll spend hours getting the job done right, even if it means your wallet takes a hit.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing Muskogee
plumbers.summary: Roto-Rooter Muskogee demonstrates excellent emergency response with same-day service and professional technicians who provide upfront pricing. Multiple customers praise their quick response times, honest estimates, and quality work, making them a reliable choice for plumbing emergencies.

plumbers.name: Doctor Drips Plumbing - Nashville
plumbers.summary: They show up fast, fix it right, and don't nickel-and-dime you—exactly what you need when your water heater dies on a Sunday.

plumbers.name: J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer and Drain
plumbers.summary: J. Blanton Plumbing consistently delivers professional, high-quality service with excellent communication and attention to detail. Multiple reviewers praise their technicians' professionalism, thoroughness, and ability to handle complex plumbing projects efficiently.

plumbers.name: Plumbers of Greenville
plumbers.summary: Plumbers of Greenville demonstrates exceptional professionalism and reliability, with customers consistently praising their honest assessments, fair pricing, and ability to respond quickly (within 24 hours). Ross and his team appear highly skilled and trustworthy, even saving customers money when repairs aren't needed.

plumbers.name: Lancaster Plumbing & Drain
plumbers.summary: Lancaster Plumbing & Drain demonstrates exceptional reliability and professionalism, with customers praising their quick emergency response and thorough service. While pricing may be slightly higher than some competitors, their consistent quality work and excellent customer service make them a solid choice for plumbing emergencies.

plumbers.name: Len The Plumber Heating & Air, LLC
plumbers.summary: Their technicians show up fast and actually fix things the same day, but you'll pay a premium for it.
redFlags: One customer abandoned mid-project for two weeks (October 2025) with poor follow-up communication
Pricing complaints appear in multiple reviews suggesting potential upselling or quote creep during service
Two separate 1-star reviews cite high diagnostic/replacement charges that felt unjustified

plumbers.name: Hiller Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Electrical
plumbers.summary: They'll get to your emergency fast and fix it right, but expect to pay significantly more than independent plumbers would charge.
redFlags: Documented pattern of pressure tactics and inflated estimates that vastly exceed market rates—advisable to get second opinions before authorizing work
Several reviews describe dishonest diagnoses to justify unnecessary equipment replacement (claiming units 'burned up' when only minor repairs needed)
Scheduling delays and missed appointment windows noted in 4+ reviews despite emergency service claims
Commission-based technician compensation structure explicitly mentioned in at least one review as driving upselling behavior

plumbers.name: Len The Plumber Heating & Air, LLC
plumbers.summary: They'll show up the same day or next day and actually fix your problem, but expect to pay top dollar for it.
redFlags: Two separate 1-star reviews citing poor scheduling reliability and wasted time (34+ hour wait for commercial job that company didn't do)
Possible AI/chatbot communication issues mentioned: customer reported 'glitchy' bots, hours of waiting with little outbound communication before cancellation
Pricing transparency concerns: One review notes technician explained $45 diagnostic fee upfront, suggesting others may not receive clear estimates before work begins

plumbers.name: Superior Plumbing
plumbers.summary: They'll fix your plumbing fast and do good work, but you're going to pay a premium price and might get hit with surprise charges.
redFlags: Bait-and-switch pricing: Multiple reviews report technicians pressuring customers into expensive jobs after arrival when phone quotes weren't given, or quoting inflated prices then claiming previous 'discounts' when coupons offered
Unresponsive management: At least 8 reviews from 2012-2023 report managers never calling back after complaints were filed

Misdiagnosis leading to unnecessary work: 3 reviews describe being quoted replacement when simple repair was needed (water heater, pressure valve, toilet), with one customer saying plumber 'couldn't tell what was wrong'
Alleged warranty abuse: Multiple reviews claim warranty costs are pocketed or warranty claims are denied/charged despite coverage

plumbers.name: ARS / Rescue Rooter
plumbers.summary: They've got great individual techs like Derek and Craig who really know their stuff, but the company seems to have a habit of quoting prices that are double or triple what competitors charge for the same work.
redFlags: No-show epidemic: 15+ documented cases of missed appointments with no communication, some involving customers taking time off work
Aggressive upselling and misdiagnosis: Multiple independent reviews confirm technicians recommend expensive replacements ($5,000–$15,000 systems) that second opinions proved unnecessary
Billing problems: Several reviews mention being charged without explanation, sent to collections without warning, or charged for free/covered services

Communication breakdown: Customers report promises of callbacks from managers that never happen, tickets closed without follow-up, and routing through call centers that claim no local Nashville availability
Warranty disputes: At least 4 reviews describe being told warranty doesn't cover items explicitly stated in contracts, or being charged labor on warrantied parts

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.summary: They show up fast even on weekends and holidays, and their techs actually explain what they're doing before they charge you.
redFlags: One detailed complaint about $860 diagnostic charge with incomplete service and supervisor dismissal of alternative troubleshooting—potential red flag for complex drain issues requiring investigation
One review flagged as possible spam (0/5 rating that is website copy, not an actual review)

plumbers.name: Benjamin Franklin Plumbing of Nashville
plumbers.summary: They'll fix your emergency fast and do quality work, but expect to pay significantly more than other plumbers in the area.
redFlags: Commission-based technician pay structure may incentivize unnecessary repairs or upsells
Pattern of diagnosing expensive problems that competitors later fix cheaply (e.g., $6K water heater quote vs $10 vent part fix; $600 service for blanket-covered heater)
Membership club auto-renewal issues and denial of emergency service to non-members despite being longtime customers
Inconsistent pricing and refusal to quote standard jobs over phone despite having published price lists

plumbers.name: Atlantis Plumbing
plumbers.summary: They show up fast, fix it right, and don't nickel-and-dime you—even when the job gets complicated.
redFlags: Two serious installation errors suggesting inconsistent quality control: thermal expansion tank mounted incorrectly with warranty-voiding consequences and dangerously high PSI adjustment.
Diagnostic accuracy concerns: One review describes confident misidentification of pipe blockage cause, resulting in unnecessary expensive work and water damage.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.summary: They'll get to you fast in an emergency, but expect to pay two to three times what other plumbers charge for the same work.
redFlags: Systematic overcharging: 11 reviews cite prices dramatically exceeding market rates and competitor estimates
Deceptive practices: Technicians avoiding diagnosis, misidentifying pipe locations, falsely claiming insurance covers repairs, refusing to provide video evidence
Inconsistent follow-up: One review reports supervisor 'vanished' after contract signed; another took a month to respond to billing disputes
High variance in technician quality: Same company produces both 5-star and 1-star reviews depending on assigned personnel

plumbers.name: Heritage Home Service
plumbers.summary: They'll get to you fast and the techs know their stuff, but you might pay more than you expected and some jobs take way longer than they should.
redFlags: Three detailed accounts of dangerous installations: water heater with untightened gas line joints, furnace vent installation causing shutoffs, heat pump with persistent refrigerant leak ignored for 3+ years
Pattern of suggesting expensive replacements ($20K furnace, $3K repairs, $4,900 diagnostics) that competitors resolve for 10% of the cost
Two instances of property damage (broken stairs/attic door, scratched door/flooded basement) with refusal to reimburse
Multiple service cancellations and no-shows without notification
One complaint about misleading 'free' maintenance plan that charged for undisclosed services

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.summary: Sayed shows up fast, fixes your problem in minutes, and actually explains what he's doing—people keep asking for him by name.
redFlags: Pricing opacity: No phone quotes offered; one customer paid $796 for minimal service, suggesting potential surprise charges for emergency calls

plumbers.name: Horizon Services - Air Conditioning, Heating, Plumbing & Electrical
plumbers.summary: The techs actually show up on time and explain what they're doing, but a couple people got quoted way too high and had to shop around.
redFlags: Pattern of aggressive upselling to replacements instead of repairs (3 separate 1-star reviews documenting this)
Discrepancy between field technician quality and administrative follow-up (one review noted contradictory alerts after tech confirmed system was working)
Unreliable quote turnaround during emergencies and poor communication on cancellations/refunds

plumbers.name: Midway Plumbing
plumbers.summary: They show up fast and explain the work clearly, but you'll pay premium prices—and some customers feel blindsided by the final bill.
redFlags: Pricing disputes: 6 of 32 Yelp reviews + 3 of 85 Google reviews cite excessive charges for straightforward jobs (faucet install, unclog, heater swap). Complaints describe estimates as 'criminal' and '2–3× competitor quotes.' This is a clear pattern across platforms.

Price creep during jobs: 2 Google reviewers report final costs significantly exceeding initial estimates without clear justification; 1 mentions $250 fence removal charge and $12k total for 5-day job.

Surprise charges and scope creep: 1 Yelp review reports undisclosed gas line damage during excavation; 1 Google review notes $3,400 power-wash quote for single line (reviewer felt equivalent to manual replacement). Suggests up-selling or insufficient initial scoping.

One old but serious incident: 1 Yelp review (2014) reports technician left gate open, dog escaped—no resolution mentioned. 1 Yelp review (2015) reports broken appointment (told same day that job pushed to next day, no advance notice) leaving customer without toilets.

plumbers.name: Hoffmann Brothers
plumbers.summary: They do solid technical work and their technicians are often friendly, but expect surprise fees, scheduling headaches, and a frustrating AI phone system that gets names wrong.
redFlags: Billing transparency failure: 7 reviews across platforms report undisclosed fees, non-itemized invoices, service charges not waived upon repair acceptance, and charges added after work completion; this is a pattern, not isolated complaints
Scheduling unreliability: 3 Yelp reviews report cancelled appointments without notice, failure to show at scheduled times, and refusal to provide weekend emergency service despite membership status
AI phone system dysfunction: 3 Google reviews report AI takes wrong names, makes scheduling errors, fails to locate appointments, and creates barriers to speaking with a human

Property damage handling: 1 Google review (deep freezer damaged during water heater install) reports refusal to acknowledge responsibility, no callback, and blame-shifting; 1 Yelp review reports mini-split damage with unresponsive management and blocked communication

Incomplete diagnosis and work: 2 Google reviews report technicians providing expensive quotes without actually testing components (washing machine motor/capacitor not tested, HVAC issue not properly diagnosed); 1 Yelp review reports plumber cut hole in tub without proper knowledge
Aggressive driving incident: 1 Google review documents company vehicle road rage behavior (high beams, tailgating) raising professionalism concerns

plumbers.name: Mr. Rooter Plumbing of Abilene
plumbers.summary: They'll fix your problem fast and the techs are genuinely nice, but some customers say the quotes are wildly inflated compared to what other plumbers charge for the same job.
redFlags: Systematic overbilling through warranty companies: Multiple claims of adding unauthorized line modifications, insulation, and drain pan charges not required by code
High-pressure sales tactics and upselling: Several reviews mention being pressured to approve expensive work on the spot or told crew was 'very busy'
Owner defensiveness and refusal to take responsibility: Multiple accounts of owner refusing to correct assessments, becoming hostile, hanging up, or dismissing complaints
Frequent no-shows and poor office communication: At least 5 reviews detail missed appointments, failure to call ahead, rude receptionist behavior, and full voicemail boxes
Dishonest damage liability: One detailed account of improper water hose installation causing $2500+ damage; owner blamed homeowner rather than taking responsibility

plumbers.name: Tim Whistler Plumbing, Gas Fitting, HVAC, and Electrical
plumbers.summary: They'll show up the same day or next morning and actually fix the problem, but expect to pay top dollar.
redFlags: Frequent pricing disputes: 9+ one-star reviews specifically cite shock at final bill being 50-200% above competitor quotes for same work
Diagnostic fee conflicts: At least 4 customers report being charged $135-$145 for estimates after being told estimates were free; company disputes vary by reviewer
Warranty/follow-up issues: Two reviews describe drain clogs recurring within 2 weeks and leaks appearing days after major work, with company refusing responsibility
Escalating estimates: One customer reported quote jumping from $375 to $1700 to $700 within same day after technician damaged existing part
Receptionist attitude issues: Multiple complaints about phone staff being rude or refusing to provide basic pricing info

plumbers.name: Command Plumbing Inc.
plumbers.summary: Command Plumbing Inc. appears to be a reliable, family-owned plumbing company with consistent 5-star reviews praising their professionalism, quality work, and fast response times. While they excel at standard plumbing services like water heater replacements and drain clearing, their 24-hour emergency availability is unclear.

plumbers.name: Plumb It Best, LLC
plumbers.summary: Plumb It Best appears to be a reliable, customer-focused plumbing company with strong installation skills and professional service. They have excellent customer satisfaction and a long track record, though emergency response time is unclear from these reviews.

plumbers.name: Star Plumbing & Drains, LLC
plumbers.summary: Star Plumbing appears to be a reliable choice for emergency plumbing needs with consistently positive reviews highlighting quick response times and fair pricing. Customers praise their professionalism, clear communication, and ability to provide cost-effective solutions that come in under initial estimates.

plumbers.name: Charge Construction & Plumbing LLC
plumbers.summary: Charge Construction & Plumbing appears to be a reliable choice for emergency plumbing needs, with experienced technicians who respond quickly and work evenings/weekends. While most customers praise their professionalism and thorough problem-solving, there's at least one significant complaint about work quality that should be noted.
redFlags: One customer paid $6k for plumbing work and was dissatisfied enough to post pictures of poor quality

plumbers.name: B & C Plumbing
plumbers.summary: B & C Plumbing appears to be a highly reliable and professional company with consistent 5-star reviews praising their responsiveness, quality work, and fair pricing. They have proven experience with both residential and commercial clients, and customers specifically highlight quick response times and professional service.

plumbers.name: HD Plumbing and Heating Inc.
plumbers.summary: HD Plumbing and Heating appears to be a reliable, honest company with quick emergency response and competitive pricing. Multiple customers praise their fast service, professional installers, and follow-up care, making them a solid choice for both emergency and routine plumbing work.

plumbers.name: Patriot Trenchless Plumbing
plumbers.summary: Patriot Trenchless Plumbing consistently receives praise for professionalism, honesty, and clear communication from customers who've used them multiple times. The team of Vince and Andy appears highly knowledgeable and trustworthy, though the limited number of reviews prevents a perfect confidence score.

plumbers.name: Elgin Plumbing & Drain Services
plumbers.summary: Elgin Plumbing & Drain Services shows strong emergency response capabilities with quick arrivals and effective problem-solving across various plumbing issues. All reviews demonstrate professional service and successful repairs, though the limited review count suggests cautious optimism.

plumbers.name: Complete Plumbing Services, Inc.
plumbers.summary: Complete Plumbing Services shows exceptional customer service and professionalism across multiple years of service, with owner Tina personally involved in customer care. While the review sample is limited, the consistency of 5-star ratings and repeat customers suggests reliable quality for emergency and routine plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Bentley's Plumbing & Electrical Co
plumbers.summary: They show up, do the job right, and won't upsell you — Google reviewers keep mentioning they actually saved money by recommending less work than expected.

plumbers.name: Brothers Plumbing | Abilene
plumbers.summary: Julian at Brothers Plumbing is the standout technician everyone mentions—thorough, kind, and willing to explain problems so you actually understand what's happening.

plumbers.name: SCA Plumbing LLC
plumbers.summary: SCA Plumbing LLC appears to be a highly reliable family-operated plumbing service with exceptional emergency response times and professional service. Multiple customers report rapid response within an hour, including weekend availability, making them particularly well-suited for urgent plumbing situations.

plumbers.name: Un stop drains llc
plumbers.summary: Kurt specializes exclusively in drain clearing and comes highly recommended for fast, honest service at reasonable prices, though the single Angi listing appears to be a generic directory entry rather than an actual review.

plumbers.name: Elvis Electric Heating Cooling and Plumbing LLC
plumbers.summary: Elvis Electric Heating Cooling and Plumbing is a highly-rated company with excellent customer service and professional technicians who are punctual and knowledgeable. They offer 24-hour service and consistently deliver quality work, though they do charge for diagnostic visits.

plumbers.name: Ace Plumbers Brandon
plumbers.summary: Ace Plumbers Brandon consistently delivers professional, reliable service with excellent attention to detail and thorough problem-solving. While emergency availability is unclear, their track record shows skilled technicians who clean up after themselves and provide honest assessments.

plumbers.name: Quick Fix Plumbers Arlington TX
plumbers.summary: Quick Fix Plumbers shows excellent reliability with consistent prompt response times (40-50 minutes) and professional service across various plumbing issues. All reviews highlight strong technical expertise and clear communication, making them a solid choice for emergency situations.

plumbers.name: Arlington Water Heater Repair & Plumbing
plumbers.summary: Arlington Water Heater Repair & Plumbing shows consistently excellent customer service with same-day availability and professional technicians. While the review sample is limited to 30 reviews, all feedback emphasizes reliability, honest pricing, and quality workmanship, making them a solid choice for emergency plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Shiloh Plumbing
plumbers.summary: Shiloh Plumbing appears to be a reliable local choice with consistent 5-star reviews and confirmed emergency availability. Owner-operator Kanaan receives praise for quick response times, professional service, and clear communication, making this a solid option for emergency plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Afford A Rooter Plumbing
plumbers.summary: Afford A Rooter consistently delivers quality sewer and main line work at competitive prices with professional service. Multiple customers highlight their fair pricing, punctual arrival times, and thorough workmanship that often beats out larger competitors.

plumbers.name: Hill & Company Service, Inc.
plumbers.summary: Shows up in under three hours and techs explain everything on-site, but labor costs have shocked multiple customers — including an $840 quote just to swap a warranty-covered part.
redFlags: Two separate reviews within the analyzed set describe sticker shock on labor costs significant enough that one customer cancelled mid-appointment — at an 84-review sample size, this is a meaningful pattern worth asking about before authorizing work

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.summary: They'll get to you fast and usually fix the problem right, but you might pay 2-3x what you'd expect and discover surprise charges after they're done.
redFlags: Bait-and-switch pricing: Quote given is often not the final price; numerous reviews of $70–$1,153 overages and surprise charges

Aggressive upselling: Multiple complaints about techs recommending expensive solutions ($3,000–$5,000+) without second opinions, later found unnecessary or inflated by customers' independent contractors
Warranty disputes: At least 3 reviews describe guarantee clauses being voided or denied post-service, with company blaming fine print
Quality variance by technician: Same company receives both 5-star and 1-star reviews often on the same issue type; outcomes heavily dependent on which technician arrives
Damage liability: Two reviews mention pipe damage caused by Roto-Rooter technicians, with company refusing to cover costs (one cited contract fine print)
Communication failures: Complaints about rude dispatch staff, difficulty reaching management, ghosting after promising callback, and one documented double-charge to bank account

plumbers.name: Jastal Plumbing
plumbers.summary: Jastal Plumbing shows strong reliability with excellent follow-up service, consistently returning the next day to address any issues. Their technicians are professional and knowledgeable, though one customer complained about reckless driving by a company vehicle.
redFlags: Reckless driving complaint about company vehicle

plumbers.name: Holt Plumbing Company
plumbers.summary: They'll show up same-day and fix it right, but you might wait hours in your window and get charged more than expected.
redFlags: Pattern of incomplete diagnosis on first visit, leading to multiple service calls for same issue and cumulative overcharges (at least 4 detailed complaints)
Multiple reports of receptionist/office staff being rude, unresponsive, or difficult to reach for follow-ups or billing disputes
At least 3 reviews allege collections action or legal threats over disputed charges and estimates
Quality variance tied to technician: some described as exceptional, others as incompetent or unprofessional on same issues

plumbers.name: Ethical Plumbing
plumbers.summary: Ethical Plumbing shows strong reliability with professional service, prompt emergency response, and generally honest pricing practices. While there's one significant pricing complaint, the majority of customers praise their professionalism and fair pricing, making them a solid choice for emergency plumbing needs.
redFlags: One customer reported significantly higher quote ($5,000 vs $2,000 competitor price for water heater)

plumbers.name: Excellent Plumbing
plumbers.summary: Excellent Plumbing shows strong reliability for emergency calls with quick response times and quality work. While pricing transparency could be better, their technical expertise and professional service make them a solid choice for urgent plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Plumbers Westminster | My Buddy
plumbers.summary: My Buddy the Plumber shows excellent emergency responsiveness, arriving within 30 minutes for a Sunday night sewage backup and completing repairs after hours. Multiple reviews highlight their honesty in avoiding unnecessary expensive repairs, though one customer felt overcharged for a sprinkler valve replacement.

plumbers.name: Serv'All Plumbing & Rooter Service
plumbers.summary: They show up fast and fix things right, but watch out — a handful of Yelp reviews suggest they've quoted sky-high prices and once caused water damage they refused to cover.
redFlags: 2 of 5 Yelp reviews (40%) report billing or liability disputes: one customer reports $2,600 water damage from technician error with refused responsibility; platform discrepancy suggests Google reviews may not capture full complaint picture

Two reviews (1 Google, 1 Yelp) report significantly overinflated quotes ($1,200 for $20 repair; another plumber diagnosed leak after Serv'All quoted full-line replacement) — pattern of expensive initial quotes that may not reflect actual work needed

plumbers.name: Beehive Plumbing Orem
plumbers.summary: Beehive Plumbing shows strong emergency responsiveness with same-day service and professional technicians, but one serious reliability concern about incomplete repairs suggests getting warranty details upfront. Most customers praise their communication and professionalism.
redFlags: One customer paid $500+ for hot water repair that failed within an hour and received poor follow-up service

plumbers.name: To the T Plumbing Heating & Air
plumbers.summary: To the T Plumbing appears to be a reliable, professional company with skilled technicians and excellent customer service. They have a strong track record for quality work and transparency, though pricing may be on the higher side for smaller jobs.

plumbers.name: Brown Plumbing - Abilene, TX
plumbers.summary: They'll drop everything for emergencies and actually show up fast, but watch out — a handful of customers got hit with surprise charges or incomplete work that needed callbacks.
redFlags: Callback delays during business hours: 3 of 86 Google reviews report long waits to schedule appointments or no callback after initial call (Feb 2025, March 2022, May 2023).

Billing disputes and price escalation: 3 reviews mention surprise charges—$280 for two diagnostic visits ($140 each), $485 for 2 hours of work billed at $120/hr, and disagreement over double service call fees; one customer noted 'prices have become outrageous' after years of loyalty.
Incomplete or repeat work: 2 reviews report work requiring 3–4 callbacks to fix correctly, suggesting possible quality control gaps on complex jobs.
One safety/conduct complaint: 1 review (Oct 2024) alleges aggressive driving behavior (horn use during emergency vehicle response).

plumbers.name: Dave's Plumbing & Repair Service, Inc.
plumbers.summary: Dave's Plumbing demonstrates exceptional problem-solving skills and reliability, with multiple reviews highlighting their ability to diagnose and fix issues that other plumbers couldn't solve. They provide same-day service, honest pricing, and thorough explanations of their work.

plumbers.name: Plumbing Aurora & Drain Clean Expert
plumbers.summary: This plumbing company demonstrates strong technical skills and professional service across various repair types. While the review sample is limited, customers consistently report effective problem-solving and clean work, making them a solid choice for emergency plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: T&T Plumbing
plumbers.summary: They show up fast on weekends and actually fix things right the first time, but a couple of reviews mention unprofessional driving behavior that's worth noting.
redFlags: 2 of 21 Google reviewers report unprofessional driving behavior including traffic violations and aggressive conduct — potential character/judgment concern despite BBB accreditation
1 of 21 reviewers reported incomplete work (job not finished as hired), suggesting occasional execution gaps

plumbers.name: First Response Plumbing
plumbers.summary: First Response Plumbing shows strong emergency response capabilities with multiple customers praising their speed and availability, including midnight service calls. While they have one concerning review about communication and pricing issues, the majority of feedback indicates reliable, professional service at fair prices.

plumbers.name: Yetti Plumbing
plumbers.summary: Yetti Plumbing appears to be a highly reliable one-person operation run by Kyle, who consistently demonstrates exceptional responsiveness, honesty, and technical expertise. While the limited number of reviews (22) prevents a perfect score, the consistent praise for after-hours availability and emergency response makes this a strong choice for urgent plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Vip PlumbingOk
plumbers.summary: VIP PlumbingOk shows strong potential with perfect 5-star reviews highlighting fast response times, weekend availability, and affordable pricing. However, with only 8 reviews, there's limited data to fully assess their reliability for emergency situations.

plumbers.name: Flatirons Plumbing
plumbers.summary: Flatirons Plumbing delivers reliable emergency service with skilled technicians who arrive promptly and solve problems effectively. However, multiple customers have complained about overcharging, and poor customer service from the office when pricing concerns are raised.
redFlags: Office manager becomes rude when customers question pricing
No willingness to make goodwill pricing adjustments

plumbers.name: Big Blue Plumbing
plumbers.summary: They show up fast and do solid work, but you'll pay a premium and need to stay on top of them to keep appointments.
redFlags: Multiple reviews (at least 5) describe aggressive upselling or scope-creeping—suggesting unnecessary full replacements instead of repairs, or proposing expensive add-ons when simpler fixes exist
Significant pricing disputes—reviews allege overcharging for parts (e.g., $92 for a $10 P-trap, $1,400 for a $50 standpipe) and labor that appears disconnected from actual time spent

After company ownership changed (sold to larger plumbing company in late 2024), communication and reliability appear to have degraded sharply—recent reviews cite missed appointments and lack of follow-up
Potential deceptive practices flagged—one reviewer noted similar 5-star reviews posted within one day with similar language, suggesting possible review padding
Warranty disputes—at least 2 reviews describe technicians verbally refusing warranty coverage or being vague about it, though invoices later stated otherwise

plumbers.name: Greer Plumbing & Water Heater Repair
plumbers.summary: They show up fast for emergencies, know their stuff, and actually care about fixing the root problem instead of just the symptom—but one recent billing dispute and no-show raises a red flag worth watching.
redFlags: One complaint (03/02/2026) involves incomplete repair, failed follow-up appointment, and no-show without communication—pattern not evident yet in 91-review sample, but the specific complaint about lack of warranty support and rude behavior warrants verification before scheduling

plumbers.name: Prime Plumbing & Heating
plumbers.summary: Prime Plumbing shows strong technical skills and professional communication, with excellent customer service from staff like Fernando and responsive weekend availability. However, one detailed review raises concerns about potentially aggressive upselling and premium pricing that may not prioritize customer value.
redFlags: Customer reported $2,300 quote that other plumbers said was overpriced, suggesting possible overcharging

plumbers.name: Hansen Heating, Plumbing & Air
plumbers.summary: Hansen Heating, Plumbing & Air shows strong technical skills and emergency responsiveness, with most customers praising their thoroughness and fair pricing. However, a concerning warranty dispute and customer service complaint suggests potential issues with standing behind their work.
redFlags: 30-day warranty policy may be insufficient for major repairs
Poor handling of warranty claims

plumbers.name: Five Star Plumbing Services
plumbers.summary: They show up fast and fix it right, but you'll pay premium rates for labor—get multiple quotes before committing.
redFlags: Pricing disputes in 3 of 84 Google reviews (3.6%) involving labor rates perceived as excessive relative to job complexity and competitor quotes; two customers felt misled by lack of upfront pricing disclosure. Company did refund or follow up in at least one case, but pattern suggests systemic pricing communication gap for small/quick jobs

plumbers.name: The Drain Guys
plumbers.summary: The Drain Guys shows strong technical expertise and emergency responsiveness, with multiple customers praising their quick 24-hour service and professional diagnosis. However, there are concerning issues with post-job cleanup, follow-up service, and customer communication that potential customers should be aware of.
redFlags: Customer reported $18,000 job with poor cleanup, ongoing ground settling issues, and complete lack of response to follow-up concerns for weeks

plumbers.name: Expert Services - Plumbing, Heating, Air & Electrical
plumbers.summary: Expert Services appears to provide quality plumbing work with knowledgeable, professional technicians who explain repairs well and aren't pushy with sales. However, they have a significant customer service issue with persistent unwanted follow-up calls and texts that continue even after customers decline services.
redFlags: Persistent unwanted contact after declining services - customers report blocking multiple phone numbers to stop calls and texts

plumbers.name: SPG Plumbing, Drain and Sewer Gurnee
plumbers.summary: SPG Plumbing shows strong technical skills and excellent emergency response, including same-day service during storms. However, one serious complaint about payment practices and incomplete work raises concerns about consistency and refund policies.
redFlags: Customer reports paying $1000 upfront with no refund for incomplete work

plumbers.name: Rescue Plumbing
plumbers.summary: Rescue Plumbing shows strong professionalism and communication, with technicians going above and beyond for emergency situations. However, there are concerning quality control issues with at least one repair failing shortly after completion and no work guarantee offered.
redFlags: No guarantee on work performed
Repair failed hours after completion requiring full re-payment

plumbers.name: JVS Plumbing Co
plumbers.summary: JVS Plumbing shows strong emergency response capabilities with same-day service and professional work, particularly excelling at water heater repairs and replacements. However, their scheduling and follow-up communication can be inconsistent, which may be frustrating during non-emergency situations.
redFlags: Significant communication breakdown in scheduling follow-ups

plumbers.name: Reliable HVAC & Plumbing
plumbers.summary: They answer the phone fast and show up the same day for emergencies, but watch out—a few customers got stuck with incomplete repairs or inflated estimates they didn't catch until later.
redFlags: Incomplete work: 1 of 69 Google reviews documents a technician who replaced only a condensate pump without diagnosing or confirming resolution of a leak, leaving the customer with a $235 bill and unresolved problem

Overestimation and unnecessary recommendations: 2 of 69 reviews mention inflated estimates ($12,000 heat system replacement later found unnecessary; another builder-home improvement deemed unnecessary when eventually ghosted) or initial misdiagnosis

Communication breakdown on follow-up: 2 of 69 reviews report technician no-show on promised follow-up appointments and complete unresponsiveness to customer callbacks—including one case where a basement flood resulted from deferred sump pump installation after Reliable ghosted the homeowner

plumbers.name: Friendly Plumbing
plumbers.summary: Friendly Plumbing shows strong reliability and honest practices, with the owner Michael receiving praise for quick emergency response and fair pricing. However, one concerning review about excessive pricing for a simple toilet clog suggests potential inconsistency in estimates.
redFlags: One report of excessive pricing ($825 for toilet unclogging)

plumbers.name: All Suburban Plumbing & Sewer Service Inc.
plumbers.summary: All Suburban Plumbing shows strong potential with excellent responsiveness, fair pricing, and helpful service, but a serious incident involving property damage and poor follow-up response raises concerns about accountability. They appear reliable for most jobs but may lack proper damage protocols.
redFlags: Caused property damage and couldn't provide immediate emergency response
Defensive attitude when addressing service failures

plumbers.name: Suburban Sewer & Septic Inc.
plumbers.summary: Suburban Sewer & Septic is a family-owned business with strong emergency response capabilities and excellent customer service, as evidenced by midnight service calls and next-day availability. While most customers praise their professionalism and quality work, there's one concerning review about incomplete work that required callbacks.
redFlags: One customer reported work was not completed properly, requiring multiple service calls

plumbers.name: Dismuke Plumbing
plumbers.summary: Dismuke Plumbing shows strong emergency response capabilities with same-day service and fair pricing, but has concerning customer service issues including potential discrimination and poor phone responsiveness that could affect reliability.
redFlags: Evidence of discriminatory practices - blocking customer's fiancé's number
Inconsistent phone service - calls going to voicemail while answering others immediately

plumbers.name: Walker Tradesman Plumbing
plumbers.summary: They show up fast for emergencies and have 17 years in business with zero BBB complaints, but Yelp reviewers consistently say they're overpriced and Google reviewers sometimes report incomplete work—the rating gap (4.7 vs 2.2) suggests real pricing friction.
redFlags: Pricing disputes are systematic: 6 of 12 Yelp reviews (50%) cite surprise fees, unexpected upsells, or labor charges perceived as unjustified. Google reviews (36 total) only have 2 negative reviews about pricing, suggesting Yelp reviewers may be documenting genuine billing friction more openly

Incomplete work and poor callback: 2 reviews report jobs left unfinished and lack of response to requests to complete work; 1 review reports pilot light not relit after water heater service requiring return visit

Quality assurance failures: Water main repair soldering failed within months at exact same location; owner initially characterized it as 'temporary fix' and refused to warranty beyond 90 days despite acknowledging poor workmanship
Owner accountability concerns: 1 detailed review documents owner cursing at customer and refusing to make right on failed repair; another review reports owner 'did not return phone call' for weeks

plumbers.name: Oakland Plumbing Experts
plumbers.summary: They're incredibly thorough and show up fast for emergencies, but one customer paid $700 for a shower cartridge replacement when others got similar work done for $600—so get a second quote before committing.
redFlags: Pricing disputes: 1 of 36 reviewers (2.8%) reported suspected overcharging; customer paid $700 for shower cartridge and $1,650 for valve work, later confirmed via second quote that similar work costs $600, suggesting 65-175% markup inconsistency.
Scheduling adherence: 1 reviewer reported 45-minute late arrival (scheduled 3-5pm, arrived 5:45pm), forcing reschedule.

plumbers.name: Watson's Plumbing & Heating
plumbers.summary: They show up fast and do quality work, but you'll pay premium prices and might get hit with surprise charges—especially in emergencies when they know you're desperate.
redFlags: Pricing disputes are systematic: 8 total reviews (across Google and Yelp) dispute charges or perceive them as excessive—this is 18% of 45 total reviews. Yelp concentration (5 of 10) suggests platform-specific pricing complaints or selective 5-star filtering on Google
Refusal to provide itemized bills: 2 independent reviews report technicians declined to itemize labor vs. parts when customers questioned inflated quotes

Emergency pricing exploitation: Yelp review explicitly states technician charged $6,150 for 2-hour job when customer expressed urgency and mentioned they didn't want to wait; customer reports ~$3,000 parts markup suggests labor inflated by $3,150 for time pressure

Incomplete diagnostics: 2 reviews report technicians misidentified problems (sump pump vs. actual issue; dishwasher vs. shower leak) or failed to complete work after initial visit (water treatment system neglected for over 1 year after parts ordered)
Inconsistent service quality under warranty: 2 reviews describe poor communication and delays (9-day wait for water heater repair authorized by Sears warranty; no follow-up on ordered parts)

plumbers.name: All Family Plumbing And Remodeling
plumbers.summary: All Family Plumbing shows strong emergency responsiveness and customer service, with multiple reviews highlighting next-day service and professional handling of urgent issues. However, with only 36 total reviews and a 3.7/5 rating, there may be some service inconsistencies not reflected in these positive reviews.

plumbers.name: Thorpe Sheet Metal
plumbers.summary: Thorpe Sheet Metal shows strong emergency response capabilities with most customers praising their quick service and professionalism. However, there's at least one concerning instance of complete no-shows, which is a significant red flag for emergency situations.
redFlags: At least one customer reported complete no-show despite multiple calls and promises

plumbers.name: Montgomery Plumbing & Heating
plumbers.summary: Montgomery Plumbing appears to be a reliable one-person operation with Kenny providing honest, fast service and creative problem-solving. However, communication issues and potential inconsistent availability are concerns for emergency situations.
redFlags: Poor communication responsiveness with multiple unreturned calls

plumbers.name: McHenry Plumbing, Inc.
plumbers.summary: McHenry Plumbing shows strong technical skills and professionalism across 31 reviews with a 4.8 rating. plumbers.name: 413 Plumbing & Heating, Inc.

plumbers.name: Reiche Plumbing

plumbers.name: Storybook Plumbing Solutions

plumbers.name: JB Plumbing

plumbers.name: D & D Plumbing Company

plumbers.name: Bill's Backflow & Plumbing Services

plumbers.name: Westminster Plumbing

plumbers.name: ZK Plumbing, LLC

plumbers.name: Canal Winchester Plumbing & Drain

plumbers.name: Brandon Plumbing

Uses phone calculator for pricing with only verbal estimates

plumbers.name: Planet Plumbing & Drain

plumbers.name: Precision Today Plumbing Heating Cooling Electrical

Furnace malfunction immediately after service visit raises questions about workmanship quality control
Discrepancy between technician documentation (everything functioning fine) and customer report (furnace broken after visit)

plumbers.name: Hi-Tech Plumbing & Leak Detect

One reviewer reports a $10,000 solution failed and caused property damage; another drain needed clearing by competitor for $230

plumbers.name: Mr. Rooter Plumbing of Huntsville

plumbers.name: Mendel Plumbing, Heating & Electric

plumbers.name: Western Heating, Air & Plumbing

redFlags: One detailed 1-star review describes a technician leaving a furnace room door broken off its hinges, a mangled filter with plastic packaging stuffed inside it, and an unseated PVC air-intake seal — none of which were disclosed or offered for repair; the reviewer also suspects the technician caused crimped wiring that wasn't present on any prior visit

Upsell pressure appears tied to declined work: the severe property damage and disarray in that 1-star review occurred immediately after the homeowner's wife declined thousands in recommended repairs, raising a concern about technician conduct post-refusal

plumbers.name: Elite Rooter Plumbers
plumbers.summary: Fast to arrive and thorough on big jobs, but one manager's response to a callback request — charging more and saying 'clearly you don't understand plumbing' — is a serious red flag if anything goes wrong after the first visit.
redFlags: 1 of 5 reviews describes a manager who refused warranty accountability after a repeat sewer backup within a week, argued with the customer, and said 'clearly you don't understand plumbing' — unprofessional behavior that matters most when you're already in crisis mode

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.summary: Technicians arrive within hours and explain problems clearly, but 781 BBB complaints in 3 years signal a serious pricing or billing pattern that these 5 uniformly glowing reviews don't address at all.
redFlags: 781 BBB complaints in 3 years is a high volume for any plumber and strongly suggests recurring billing, pricing, or service disputes that are completely absent from this small review sample — treat the 5-star sweep with caution

plumbers.name: Hunter Super Techs
plumbers.summary: Technicians show up within the hour and treat your home like they own it — but pricing transparency is a complete unknown with zero cost data across all 5 reviews.

plumbers.name: Bailey Brothers Plumbing, Heating and Air Conditioning
J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer & Drain
